bosses.name: Aelis Siryasius
bosses.desc: Aelis Siryasius can be found in the Lower City Sewers of Baldur's Gate during Act Three.

bosses.name: Ansur
bosses.desc: Ansur is an undead dragon found in Baldur's Gate 3.

bosses.name: Apostle of Myrkul
bosses.desc: The Apostle of Myrkul is a powerful enemy that serves as the final boss of Act Two.

bosses.name: Auntie Ethel
bosses.desc: Auntie Ethel is a fussy trader of potions, lotions, quirks, and sundries who can be first encountered in The Hollow of the Emerald Grove.

bosses.name: Balthazar
bosses.desc: Balthazar is an Undead necromancer, who can first be encountered in the Gauntlet of Shar during Act Two.

bosses.name: Bernard
bosses.desc:
__NOTOC__



Bernard is the Construct guardian of the Arcane Tower in the Underdark.

bosses.name: Bulette
bosses.desc: Bulettes are a type of Monstrosity and non-playable race in Baldur's Gate 3.

bosses.name: Cazador Szarr
Dominated Red Dragon
bosses.desc: A Dominated Red Dragon can be encountered Atop the Netherbrain in Act Three.

bosses.name: Dror Ragzlin
bosses.desc: Dror Ragzlin is one of the three bosses at the Goblin Camp who works for the Cult of the Absolute.

bosses.name: Enver Gortash
bosses.desc: Lord Enver Gortash, often just referred to as Gortash, is the Chosen of , and one of the leaders of the enigmatic Cult of the Absolute.

bosses.name: Grym
bosses.desc: Grym is a powerful Adamantine Golem that eternally protects the Adamantine Forge.

bosses.name: Har'rak
bosses.desc:
__NOTOC__



Ch'r'ai Har'rak is a Githyanki Paladin Paladin despite the fact that this Paladin subclass is not available to player characters.

bosses.name: Kagha
bosses.desc: Kagha is a wood elven druid in the Emerald Grove during Act One.

bosses.name: Kar'niss
bosses.desc: Kar'niss is a drider in service of the Absolute, whom he serves after being cast out by Lolth, the Queen of Spiders.

bosses.name: List of Bosses
bosses.desc: Bosses are a special type of character in Baldur's Gate 3.

classes.name: Barbarian
classes.desc: The Barbarian is a powerful class with 12-sided hit dice and expertise in STR, CON saves.

classes.name: Bard
classes.desc: The Bard is a powerful class with 8-sided hit dice and expertise in DEX, CHA saves.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.desc: The Cleric is a powerful class with 8-sided hit dice and expertise in WIS, CHA saves.

classes.name: Druid
classes.desc: The Druid is a powerful class with 8-sided hit dice and expertise in INT, WIS saves.

classes.name: Fighter
classes.desc: The Fighter is a powerful class with 10-sided hit dice and expertise in STR, CON saves.

classes.name: Monk
classes.desc: The Monk is a powerful class with 8-sided hit dice and expertise in STR, DEX saves.

classes.name: Paladin
classes.desc: The Paladin is a powerful class with 10-sided hit dice and expertise in WIS, CHA saves.

classes.name: Ranger
classes.desc: The Ranger is a powerful class with 10-sided hit dice and expertise in STR, DEX saves.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.desc: The Rogue is a powerful class with 8-sided hit dice and expertise in DEX, INT saves.

classes.name: Sorcerer
classes.desc: The Sorcerer is a powerful class with 6-sided hit dice and expertise in CON, CHA saves.

classes.name: Warlock
classes.desc: The Warlock is a powerful class with 8-sided hit dice and expertise in WIS, CHA saves.

classes.name: Wizard
classes.desc: The Wizard is a powerful class with 6-sided hit dice and expertise in INT, WIS saves.
